tool=observe_ui params=map[] reason=Current observation shows only generic inputs and no file input or upload button; re-observe the page to discover those elements (check for lazy-loaded or scrolled content).
tool=observe_ui params=map[] reason=Rescan the page to locate the student data table (initial observation did not show a table selector; broaden strategy and re-observe the DOM).

tool=observe_ui params=map[] reason=The previous observation did not show a file input or upload button; re-check the current DOM (may be offscreen, in an iframe, or lazy-loaded) per RULE 5.

Observed page multiple times; no table or student data selector was found in the UI observations, so the students table is not present/visible.
